title: Storage account allows public blob access
description: prod-data-store has 'Allow Blob public access' enabled at account level.

title: SQL Database missing transparent data encryption audit
description: Auditing not configured on orders-db; encryption-at-rest events not logged.

title: NSG allows 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22
description: Network security group on app-prod-01 exposes SSH to the internet.

title: Unattached disk not encrypted with CMK
description: Orphaned disk vm-old-07-osdisk uses platform-managed keys only.
